description: An agronomist has flown a field with a multispectral drone and needs the agent to process the data and identify areas of crop stress.

nodes.task_description: Stitch the individual drone images together to create a single orthomosaic map of the field.
Generate various vegetation indices from the multispectral data, such as NDVI, NDRE, and OSAVI.
Compare the different index maps to identify and delineate specific areas of crop stress that may not be visible in a standard NDVI map.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies areas of stress using the NDRE map that were not apparent in the NDVI map, suggesting a nutrient issue.
